features: Compact and Portable Design: The STATUS Toulouse Travel Hair Dryer folds neatly into a compact size, making it an ideal companion for your travel needs. Its 1200W motor ensures you have a reliable and efficient drying solution on the go.

Adjustable Speeds and Dual Voltage: With 2 speeds and the flexibility of dual voltage (230V or 115V), this travel hair dryer accommodates various hair types and international power standards, providing versatility for your global travels.

Precision Heat with Optional Nozzle: The optional nozzle allows for directed heat, enabling you to focus on specific areas. This feature adds a level of precision to your styling routine, ensuring you can achieve the desired look even while on the move.

Safety on the Go: The overheat protection feature automatically turns off the hair dryer if it becomes too hot, offering peace of mind and safety during your travels. It's a thoughtful addition to ensure your hair dryer remains reliable and safe.

On-the-Go Convenience: The 1.6m cord and hanging hoop of the STATUS Toulouse Travel Hair Dryer ensure hassle-free styling, whether at home or on the road. Designed for maximum ease of use during your travels.
description: Product Description This STATUS 1200W Toulouse hair dryer features 2 speeds and fold neatly to a compact size for your travel needs. Dual voltage option allows the user to choose between 230V or 115V. The optional nozzle helps to direct heat directly where you need it. Overheat proection will automatically turn off your hair dryer if it becomes too hot. 1,6 metre cord length with handy hanging hoop. Safety Warning Do not use the hair dryer for extended periods to prevent overheating. If the hair dryer becomes too hot, it will automatically shut off.
